form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 9 at this track on April 8 over 1200m, 7 len behind Duzce Aslani with 57kg at $4.55. The start before that scored a big 3.5 len win at this track April 1 over 1200m defeating Goodbye carrying 58kg at $4.40. Should go well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation 11th of 14 at Sanliurfa December 15 over 1200m, 20 len behind King Yakup with 59kg at $13.50. When resuming last campaign second last of 9 at this track November 12 over 1500m, 16 len behind Golden Cooger carrying 58.5kg at $5.65. Major upset if she won.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Resuming after a break of four months. form.formComment: Most recently favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.75 len at this track April 8 over 1200m defeating Lady Scream carrying 56.5kg at $2. Before that 2nd in a small field at this track on April 1 over 1500m, 6 len behind Jazzmaster with 60kg at $3.55. Big chance again.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 6th of 14 at Sanliurfa on March 11 over 1200m, 12 len behind Pasa Seydo with 58kg at $5.20. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 7 len at Sanliurfa March 30 over 1400m defeating Sincero carrying 58kg at $2.10. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. Last start 5th of 9 at Sanliurfa on March 16 over 1400m, 14 len behind King Of The Field carrying 58kg at $33.60. The run before that 4th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 4 over 1900m, 25 len behind Korkmaz Kardesler carrying 54kg at $8.60. Hard to make a case on recent form.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 13th of 17 at Sanliurfa on February 25 over 1200m, 27 len behind Mete Koc Bey with 52kg at $33.45. Second-up 5th of 9 at this track on April 8 over 1200m, 16 len behind Duzce Aslani carrying 55kg at $26.60. Not doing enough of late to threaten.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 8 at this track on April 8 over 1900m, 13 len behind Cevik Hani carrying 55kg at $10.65. The start before that 5th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 30 over 1400m, 20 len behind Royal Warrior carrying 55kg at $10.60. Well held last time and facing tough task today.
